C

camera - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
CAMERA_RADIUS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
cameraRig - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
canBeShotAt(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
candidatesForCluster(Board, List<Position>) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
A lone hit means the orientation isn't known yet -- probe all four sides.
canPlaceShip(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Checks whether ship could be placed on this board right now, without actually placing it and without throwing on failure.
Cell - Class in com.example.battleship.model.board
A single cell of a Board: its current CellState, and -- if a ship occupies it -- a reference to that ship, used to look up hit/sunk information without scanning the whole fleet.
Cell(Position) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
 
CELL_SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
Width/depth of a single board cell, in 3D units.
CellAlreadyShotException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exception
Thrown when a shot targets a cell that has already been shot at (miss, hit, or sunk).
CellAlreadyShotException(Position) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.CellAlreadyShotException
 
cellCenterX(int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
X offset of the center of cell index within this ship's local coordinates.
cells - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
 
CellState - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.board
The state a single board Cell can be in.
CellState() - Constructor for enum class com.example.battleship.model.board.CellState
 
cheatRevealActive - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
 
chooseShot(Board) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.MachinePlayer
Chooses this machine's next shot on the opponent's board, using its ShootingStrategy.
chooseTarget(Board) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
chooseTarget(Board) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.RandomShootingStrategy
Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
chooseTarget(Board) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.player.ShootingStrategy
Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
clampElevation(double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
clearPreview() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
collectHitCluster(Board, Position, Set<Position>) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Flood-fills every orthogonally-connected hit cell starting from start.
column - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
The field for the column record component.
column - Variable in exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.OutOfBoardException
 
column - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.Water3D
 
column() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
Returns the value of the column record component.
COLUMNS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BoardView3D
Number of columns on the board.

com.example.battleship.view.ships - package com.example.battleship.view.ships
 
COMBAT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.controller.GamePhase
HU-2/HU-4: turns alternate between the human and the machine.
CombatAdapter - Class in com.example.battleship.controller.event
No-op default implementation of CombatListener, following the same Adapter pattern as ShipPlacementAdapter.
CombatAdapter() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.event.CombatAdapter
 
combatController - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
 
CombatController - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Handles HU-2 (the human player firing at the machine's board) and HU-4 (the machine automatically firing back).
CombatController(Game, BattlefieldView3D, Map<Ship, Ship3D>, Map<Ship, Ship3D>) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
CombatController.HumanBoardListener - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Shots landing on the human's board -- fired by the machine.
CombatController.MachineBoardListener - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Shots landing on the machine's board -- fired by the human player.
CombatListener - Interface in com.example.battleship.controller.event
Receives notifications about the combat phase (HU-2, HU-4): whose turn it is, and when the game ends.
Config3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view
Shared scale constants and reusable materials for all 3D shapes on the board (water, ships and shot marks).
Config3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
 
continueButton - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
countPerFleet - Variable in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
 
countSunkShips() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.Player
 
create() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
Builds one wreckage cluster, centered on the local origin (the caller positions it over a cell).
create(ShipType, int, int, Orientation) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.ShipFactory3D
Creates the 3D shape matching the requested ship type.
createFullFleetTypes() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipFactory
The type of every ship a complete fleet must contain, in a sensible placement order (largest first) -- one entry per ship, so the list has 20 total cells' worth of ships across AIRCRAFT_CARRIER.getCountPerFleet() + SUBMARINE.getCountPerFleet() + ... entries.
createGradientTexture(Color, Color, int, int) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
Bakes a vertical two-color gradient into a small bitmap once, up front -- a texture, not a live gradient Paint.
createLabel(String, BoardLabels3D.Board) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
Builds one label's flat textured quad, sized to keep the baked text image's own aspect ratio.
createShip(ShipType, Position, Orientation) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipFactory
Creates a single ship of the given type at the given position and orientation.
createWallQuad(double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
A single flat rectangle (2 triangles, no thickness), lying in its local XY plane.
CSS_PATH - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.Main
 
currentElevation - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
The public, intuitive elevation value (0 = level with the target, 90 = straight overhead).
currentOrientation - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
currentTurn - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
 
currentTurn - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
